user.title: Danalock Cloud Credentials
user.description:
Enter your Danalock account username and password. This integration communicates via the Danalock Cloud API.

**Important:** Ensure Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) is **disabled** on this account and that it is the **owner** account for the lock and bridge.

reauth.title: [%key:common::config_flow::title::reauth%]
reauth.description: Authentication for Danalock Cloud account '{username}' failed. Please enter the current password.

init.title: Danalock Cloud Options
init.description: Adjust Danalock Cloud integration options. The optimistic state update provides instant UI feedback but may be temporarily inaccurate.

refresh_devices.name: Refresh Devices
refresh_devices.description: Forces an immediate refresh of all Danalock device states and battery levels from the cloud API for all configured accounts.
